markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 21. Admin. of Aeronautics
##### § 21.110 — Aviation Facilities Capital Improvement Program; Budget Preparation

The department shall consider the aviation facilities capital improvement program in preparing the department’s biennial budget request to the legislature.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The department shall consider the aviation facilities capital improvement program in preparing the department’s biennial budget request to the legislature.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
